text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
Wow, this is delicious, Trainer! I could eat it
nonstop!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As a way to show their thanks for Copano Rickey
having saved their inn, the couple we recently
met have invited us to enjoy their campsite.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
Now that we're nice and full, it's time to revitalize
our spirit by absorbing all we can of nature's qi!

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
Whoa, they're so agile! I can see their silhouettes
in the water, but none of them are biting—

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
Huh, oh?! It's taken the bait! Are you my lucky
catch? Grab the net, Trainer! The net!

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text: Look, Trainer! We can see Mount Fuji!

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
Did you know there are dragon veins running
through Mount Fuji? The connect all the way to
Tokyo, channeling positive energy!

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
Ah, just looking at it makes me want to climb to
the summit! What do you say, Trainer? Up for a
hike?

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
Ahaha! I'm kidding! We should definitely go
sometime though!

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
Whew, that was a lot of fun! I guess it's time to
head back.

text_block_list.name: Hotel Guest A
text_block_list.text: Wait, so I'm the bad guy here?!

text_block_list.name: Hotel Guest B
text_block_list.text:
Yeah! You've been sulking this whole time. You
sucked all the fun out of today!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Startled by the sudden shouts of anger, I turn to
see two campsite guests arguing.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
...Oh that's not good at all. There's bad energy
flowing all through the cottage they're in. There's
a clashing of qi at T-junction of the building.
choice_data_list:
Think you can use your feng shui expertise to
fix it?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She might be able to do something to rectify the
awkward atmosphere like she did at the inn
before.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
You bet I can! All riiight. Let's do it Copa-style
once more! ☆

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
Excuse me... it's not good to argue! Instead, how
about changing the mood of your room with a
little feng shui?

text_block_list.name: Hotel Guest B
text_block_list.text:
Excuse me?! Who do you think you are? Did your
parents never teach you to mind your own
business?

text_block_list.name: Hotel Guest A
text_block_list.text:
That's right! Keep your nose out of it! This is
between us two!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The guests are right. What Copano Rickey is
doing is, after all, meddling. However...

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
I want to soothe your hearts with feng shui! If you
give me a shot, I'll do the best I can!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She just wants to see them smile. She wants
everyone here to enjoy themselves.
choice_data_list:
Perhaps you could give her a few moments of
your time and listen to what she has to say?

text_block_list.name: Hotel Guest A
text_block_list.text:
Huh? First her, now you? Who the heck are you
people?
choice_data_list:
We just don't want you to leave here with only
bad memories.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text: Trainer...

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
Yes, that's right! We want to help you enjoy your
camping trip!

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
You see, there are some building structures that
make it easier for discord to arise. If you look
over this way...

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
Thank you for helping out today, Trainer! I'm glad
those two finally cooled their heads!

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
It's all thanks to you! I'm really happy you
believed in me!

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
You gave me a huge confidence boost! And you
were so cool! Like, for real!
choice_data_list: That's because I knew you'd figure out a way.
I was fearful for a moment...

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
Hehe. I'm grateful for your trust! You can always
rely on this feng shui master!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Seeing Copano Rickey full of confidence, I realize
she's at her best when she's in high spirits. The
event ends up making for a great memory.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text: Oh, really? Hehe, actually, I was too.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
But, you did your very best to help me! It was
thanks to you we got it all sorted out!
Everything's totally Copa-cool! Right? ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Part of her charm is how quickly she seems to
perk up her mood. As this thought comes to mind,
our conversation turns to fond memories.
